raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Land and Its People,’ by David Sedaris
book_title: ‘The Land and Its People,’ by David Sedaris
description: In David Sedaris’s wry new collection, being alive is as weird, atrocious, contradictory, unfair and funny as ever.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘Dekonstructing the Kardashians,’ by MJ Corey
description: In “Dekonstructing the Kardashians,” MJ Corey takes America’s most famous TV clan seriously.
